name: EXPEDITORS INTERNATIONAL OF WASHINGTON INC
summary: PART I ITEM 1B USINESS Overview Expeditors International of Washington, Inc. (herein referred to as "Expeditors, the "Company," "we," "us," "our") provides a full suite of global logistics services, offering customers access to an international network of people and integrated information systems to support the movement and strategic positioning of goods.
